diagnostic_classes.trigger: requested update crosses major ABI line
diagnostic_classes.required_action: block upgrade and require same-major rollback channel

diagnostic_classes.trigger: candidate or preview channel requires runtime compatibility shim behavior
diagnostic_classes.required_action: publish runtime-fallback-required warning and rollback guidance

diagnostic_classes.trigger: offline bundle or installer receipt format changes across minor lines
diagnostic_classes.required_action: publish data-format-fallback-required warning and explicit install-root backup guidance

diagnostic_classes.trigger: requested channel is outside its support window
diagnostic_classes.required_action: publish deprecated-channel warning and recommend stable rollback
